variants.name: Trample Beatdown
variants.strategy: Focus on creatures with natural trample and ways to give trample to others, maximizing Stonebrow's +2/+2 buff. Use combat tricks and anthems to create overwhelming attacks.

variants.name: Token Trample
variants.strategy: Generate large numbers of creature tokens and give them trample, turning small tokens into massive threats with Stonebrow's ability. Focus on token generation and mass pump effects.

variants.name: Equipment Voltron
variants.strategy: Use equipment and auras to create large trampling threats, with Stonebrow himself as a key threat. Focus on protection and recurring equipment to maintain board presence.
